policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="userPrompt" value="@{
      var body = context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
      var msgs = body["messages"] as JArray;
      if (msgs == null) return string.Empty;
      var last = msgs.Last(m => (string)m["role"] == "user");
      return last == null ? string.Empty : (string)last["content"];
    }" />

    
      @($"{{content-safety-endpoint}}/contentsafety/text:analyze?api-version=2024-09-01")
      POST
      
        {{content-safety-key}}
      
      
        application/json
      
      @{
        return new JObject(
          new JProperty("text", (string)context.Variables["userPrompt"]),
          new JProperty("categories", new JArray("Hate","SelfHarm","Sexual","Violence")),
          new JProperty("outputType", "FourSeverityLevels")
        ).ToString();
      }
    

    
      <when condition="@{
        var r = ((IResponse)context.Variables["csResponse"]).Body.As(preserveContent: true);
        var cats = r["categoriesAnalysis"] as JArray;
        if (cats == null) return false;
        return cats.Any(c => (int)c["severity"] >= 2);
      }">
        
          
          
            application/json
          
          { "error": { "code": "content_filtered", "message": "Input blocked by content safety policy" } }
